C/ IS 2062 or equivalent and suitable for intended service, welded construction and 16mm minimum wall thickness. The hotwell shall be of same material as that of the shell and shall be longitudinally divi ded with proper drainage provisions. iv) Condenser shall be spring supported and di rectly welded to the turbine exhaust.
